name: @stackra/monitoring
purpose: Error-monitoring — consent-agnostic, fan-out manager over pluggable providers (Sentry, console, custom), with auto-registration and React bindings.
capabilities: Fan-out manager over N monitoring providers
when_to_use: Wiring Sentry (or an alternative) plus custom reporters for uncaught errors, breadcrumbs, and performance traces.
when_not_to_use: For product analytics events use @stackra/analytics; for developer console logs use @stackra/logger.
